⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: A Gallup survey found that over 70% of Americans oppose AI data center construction in their area.

🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more autonomous and self-improving AI systems, but this raises concerns about accountability and responsibility.
